creator: skv@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I can pass you maintainership of this port, 
but please fix errors in your current patch. 

Just test it with "port test" for both mod_perl-1 and mod_perl-2. 
(see /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/porttools) 

Hints: 
* fix manpages 
* use PLIST_DIRS
